text:
YouSeeBIGGIRL/T:T is the 3rd track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics by Rie 
Sung by Gemie

Title

The title of the song appears to be a play on words which can be interpreted as "Ymir." In Japanese, "see" is . When coupled with "You" in the title, this creates the sound , Ymir's name in katakana.

If "T" stands for "Titan", and the colon is read as 対 (tai) - which can mean "versus" - "T:T" could be translated to "Titan vs Titan".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:40) is a motif used in a few other tracks:

attack音D (0:00-2:33)
AOTs2M他3
Apple Seed
Apple Seed (Instrumental)

Sometimes, only the ostinato (0:27-0:39) is used.

The second part (2:42-5:57) is a remix of the second part of Vogel im Käfig.
